# Common Disasters and Recovery

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Chapter status:** stub. Scope: A one-page panic reference: huge file committed, leaked key, detached HEAD, lost rebase, bad merge.
:::

<!-- DRAFTING NOTES (remove on final)
Running example: minimum-wage DiD project in ../sandbox.
Tier each technical section with ::: {.tier-beginner} / {.tier-advanced}.
Use PITFALL / RECOVERY / REPRODUCIBILITY callouts.
Every command block: command + REAL output + one sentence why.
Wrap code/terminal to ~64 chars. No em-dashes.
-->

## Try it yourself {.unnumbered}

_Exercise tied to the running example will go here._
